The '''''Ironhand''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] that served as part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was escorting part of the Task Force's convoy. However, the convoy ships containing [[Warhead/Legends|Warheads]] would be [[Mission to Almaran|destroyed]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A-wing]]s to buy time for the Rebels. The Cruiser would then attempt to stop the s from [[Battle of Swellen|capturing]] the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]''. However the cruiser was destroyed by [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]].
